chevron.blink_rule: ALWAYS blinking in every context — no exceptions. Not on hover, not on active — permanently blinking.
chevron.animation_method: CSS keyframes (HTML/CSS context) + SMIL animate (SVG favicon)
chevron.css_class_rule: .lt-chevron { color: #00FFD1; animation: chevron-blink 1s step-start infinite; display: inline-block; }

studio_suffix.rule: MUST be visually much darker/dimmer than UNREAL>ILLE — never same weight or color. 0.32 opacity max.

mono.usage: Labels, metadata, tags, badges, code, nav metadata, footer credits

nav.right: document title + metadata in Space Mono

footer.right: credits block in Space Mono uppercase chalk_42 with cyan highlight

icr_badge.description: Animated pulse dot + Space Mono label. Applied to all ICR-compliant document footers.
icr_badge.rule: MANDATORY in footer of every document output — no exceptions. ICR = Industrial Consistency Ready. Both Claude (technical) + Sam (business) must confirm green.
icr_badge.placement: Footer — always. Center or alongside footer credits.

favicon.spec: 32x32 SVG — chevron > in #00FFD1 blinking on #070809 background
favicon.embed_method: base64 data URI — embed in <head> of EVERY HTML output
favicon.rule: REQUIRED in every HTML document output — no exceptions

png_assets_note.method: Pillow threshold: pixels with all channels < 30 set to transparent
png_assets_note.valid_use: All contexts — alpha channel now correct

reference_implementations.note: Legacy — pre-blinking chevron, do not use as reference

reference_implementations.status: CURRENT REFERENCE — blinking chevron, ICR badge, STUDIO dimmed, favicon embedded

favicon.spec: 32×32 SVG — chevron polygon in #00FFD1 blinking, transparent background
favicon.animation_method: SMIL <animate> — works in Chrome/Edge/Firefox without CSS support in favicon context
favicon.embed_rule: MANDATORY in <head> of EVERY HTML output — no exceptions
favicon.embed_position: First tag in <head>, before any stylesheet links
favicon.svg_source:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="32" height="32">
  <rect width="32" height="32" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="6,3 22,16 6,29 10,29 26,16 10,3" fill="#00FFD1">
    <animate attributeName="opacity"
      values="1;1;0;0;1"
      keyTimes="0;0.49;0.5;0.99;1"
      dur="1s"
      repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </polygon>
</svg>
favicon.safari_note: Safari does not support SVG favicon animation — static chevron shown. Acceptable trade-off.

signatures._rule: Two versions of the signature. Claude must apply the correct one based on output type. No improvisation.

version_A_web_outputs.use_for: HTML reports, landing pages, web documents, any browser-rendered output
version_A_web_outputs.header_html: UNREAL>ILLE STUDIO
version_A_web_outputs.footer_html: UNREAL>ILLE STUDIO ICR
version_A_web_outputs.layout: header: logotype izq + metadata der | footer: logotype grande izq + ICR badge centro + créditos mono der
version_A_web_outputs.icr_position: footer always — center or alongside footer credits

version_B_internal_documents.use_for: Internal PDFs, client proposals, xlsx, printed reports, docx
version_B_internal_documents.description: Compact signature block — logotype + tagline + ICR on same line or stacked
version_B_internal_documents.footer_pattern: UNREAL>ILLE STUDIO  ·  ICR  ·  Confidencial · Uso Interno  ·  [Date]
version_B_internal_documents.chevron_note: In plain text contexts (xlsx cells, docx): use literal > character. No animation possible — acceptable.
version_B_internal_documents.studio_note: In xlsx/docx: use gray text color (R:100 G:100 B:100) for STUDIO to approximate opacity effect
version_B_internal_documents.icr_note: Always include ICR label — even in plain text: 'ICR Standard Active'
version_B_internal_documents.example_footer_text: UNREAL>ILLE STUDIO  ·  ICR Standard Active  ·  Confidencial  ·  23 Mar 2026

output_standards._mandatory_checklist: Claude MUST verify all items before delivering any output
every_html_output: favicon_link_tag in <head> — first element, before stylesheets
lt-studio class with opacity 0.32 or lower — visually much dimmer than main logotype
Recipients listed in header (Sam / PO / Laura as applicable)
every_xlsx_output: Footer note or separate tab: 'UNREAL>ILLE STUDIO · ICR Standard Active · [Date]'
STUDIO in gray text to differentiate from main logotype text
output_standards.icr_rule: ICR appears in EVERY output — web, xlsx, docx, pdf. No exceptions. ICR = Industrial Consistency Ready.
output_standards.favicon_rule: Favicon appears in EVERY HTML output. Use embed_tag from favicon section. No exceptions.
